channel.title: elswhere
channel.description: elsie's internet closet, stuffed with art,blogs, and random stuff.

item.title: i'm not dead i swear
item.description: Elsie reemerges after 5 months of inactivity, writes a blog, and dissappears off the face of the earth again.

item.title: i compare a lot
item.description: Elsie explores her inferiority complex and comes to no conclusion

item.title: the "fuck it i'll do it myself" mentality
item.description: Elsie gets too bored again and waste too much time on projects she can literally just buy with £20

item.title: thoughts in the filler episodes
item.description: Another ramble on the projects I've been up to due to being bored asl in the summer.

item.title: why am i making a website?
item.description: A quick ramble on why this website was created, and some more stuff.
